name: three-smiles
description: A private daily joy habit site for Daisy and Charlie, with an optional lightweight shared-entry backend.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check sw.js && node --check sw-v2.js && node tests/test-login-gate.js && node tests/test-app-icons.js && node tests/test-service-worker.js && node --test tests/test-server-auth.js
scripts.test: node tests/test-login-gate.js && node tests/test-app-icons.js && node tests/test-service-worker.js && node --test tests/test-server-auth.js
